info.title: Search Pioneer Ranking CLI
info.description: Learning to Rank (LTR) command line interface (CLI) tool for training rankers with LightGBM and FastTree

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Train and evaluate ranking models using LightGBM and FastTree

commands.name: train
commands.description: Train a ranker with LightGBM or FastTree.

commands.name: split
commands.description: Split input training data to create train/test/validation data.

commands.name: fold
commands.description: Split input training data into K cross-validation folds of train/test data.

commands.name: transform
commands.description: Transform a CSV data set file of features into a LETOR dataset
